greeting.text: Cold enough to crack a blade up here. I keep a forge and a full pack for anyone climbing higher. What do you need?

repair.text: Aye, bring your armor and blades to me and I'll mend, forge, or break them down — same as any smith in town, only closer to the ice.

wares.text: Potions, healing scrolls, a warm meal, oil for your lamp. LIST to see it all. No sense freezing to death for want of a torch.

end.text: Keep your footing on the ice.
